chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1947 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition as notices not issued as cost and copies have not been supplied by the learned counsel. 18.05.2022 This petition pertains to a transaction regarding which a declaration was sought that a sale certificate may not be issued and sale deed may not be registered. At the very outset, the petitioner has sought a negative declaration even otherwise such course could only be settled before a civil court as it requires evidence. In this petition notices were ordered on the last date of hearing and it is fixed for non-prosecution. Consequently, the petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
